title: Five Unknown(String) enums: hand-written serde boilerplate will drift on spec additions
description: SpanType, ContactPresence, ChannelPermissionTargetType, DeliveryState, and QuotaScope now each have a hand-written as_str()/Display/Serialize/Deserialize block following the OwnerPresence pattern. When the spec adds a new variant, all five need updating identically or they silently fall through to Unknown(String). A macro (e.g., jmap_string_enum!) would generate the boilerplate from a list of (Variant, "wire-string") pairs and eliminate drift risk.
